with_children.label: Children
with_children.children:
<Title
      dark
      marginLeft="md"
      size={4}
      text="Design & Handoff Process was moved to UX Designer Learning Track."
  />
  <Button
      dark
      onClick={() => alert("Undo clicked")}
      paddingRight="none"
      text="Undo"
      variant="link"
  />

positioned.label: Positioned
positioned.template:
<FixedConfirmationToast
    horizontal={horizontal}
    onClose={() => setOpen(false)}
    open={open}
    text={`${vertical} ${horizontal}`}
    vertical={vertical}{{props}}
/>

props.text: Multi-line is used when the given text will not fit on one line. Resize the screen to see the toast wrap the text.

success.message: Success is the default confirmation toast pattern for completed actions.

error_closeable.message: Closeable shows the dismiss icon and lets the user close the toast.

neutral.message: Positioned sets both vertical and horizontal, which are both needed for fixed placement.

custom_icon.message: Custom Icon replaces the default status icon while keeping the toast status styling.

no_icon.message: No Icon uses icon="none" to render text without any leading icon.

multi_line.message: Multi Line allows longer toast messages to wrap instead of staying on one line.

auto_close.message: Auto Close dismisses the toast after the configured duration in milliseconds.

children.message: Children mode replaces text with composed content, matching the docs example with a title and Undo action.

positioned_controls.message: Positioned Controls keeps open, onClose, vertical, and horizontal in wrapper state so the buttons can reopen and move the toast.
